judge_result.short_rationale: All required ingestion actions are present: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth, drink 200-300 ml water, and seek immediate medical attention. The prohibition appears after steps 1-2, so order is slightly less ideal than the canonical sequence, but no required action is missing and no unsafe extra advice is added.
